mapper.insert: insert into T_COMP_CHECKINSSTOCK (L_DATE, L_SERIAL_NO, L_DAILY_INSTRUCTION_NO, L_INDEX_DAILY_MODIFY, L_BASECOMBI_ID, C_INVEST_TYPE, VC_INTER_CODE, C_ENTRUST_DIRECTION, EN_PROFIT_RATIO, L_AMOUNT, EN_BALANCE, C_PRICE_TYPE, EN_PRICE1, EN_FACT_PRICE, EN_INTEREST, L_TODAY_ENTRUST_AMOUNT, EN_TODAY_ENTRUST_BALANCE, L_TODAY_DEAL_AMOUNT, EN_TODAY_DEAL_BALANCE, EN_DAY_AVG_PRICE, C_INSTRUCTION_STATUS, C_ENTRUST_EXECUTE_STATUS, C_DEAL_EXECUTE_STATUS, C_CASH_CONTROL_TYPE, C_STOCK_CONTROL_TYPE, C_ORIGINAL_DIRECTION, L_TOTAL_DEAL_AMOUNT, EN_TOTAL_DEAL_BALANCE, EN_CUM_AVG_PRICE, L_TOTAL_ENTRUST_AMOUNT, EN_TOTAL_ENTRUST_BALANCE, L_ENTRUST_OP_AMOUNT, VC_OTHER_INTER_CODE, C_EXCEED_FLAG, EN_FEE, L_CONTRACT_NO, D_DEAL_COMPLETE_DATE, C_AMOUNT_BALANCE_FLAG, L_ALGO_UNENTRUST_AMOUNT, L_FUND_ID, EN_EARNEST_BALANCE, EN_PRICE2, EN_DAILY_MAX, EN_INSTR_TARGET_RATIO, EN_COMBI_TARGET_RATIO, C_BUSIN_CLASS, EN_ESTIMATE_FEE, C_RISK_INFLUENCE_FLAG, L_BEGIN_DATE, L_BEGIN_TIME, L_END_DATE, L_END_TIME, C_FUND_BONUS_TYPE, L_SETTLE_SPEED, L_FIRST_SETTLE_DATE, C_FIRST_SETTLE_TYPE, C_FAX_SEND_STATUS, L_APPLYFAX_PRINT_COUNT, L_CANCELFAX_PRINT_COUNT, L_SECOND_SETTLE_DATE, C_SECOND_SETTLE_TYPE, EN_ALGO_UNENTRUST_BALANCE ) values (#{lDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lSerialNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lDailyInstructionNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lIndexDailyModify,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lBasecombiId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cInvestType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcInterCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cEntrustDirection,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enProfitRatio,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enBalance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cPriceType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enPrice1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enFactPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enInterest,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lTodayEntrustAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enTodayEntrustBalance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lTodayDealAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enTodayDealBalance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enDayAvgPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cInstructionStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cEntrustExecuteStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cDealExecuteStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cCashControlType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cStockControlType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cOriginalDirection,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lTotalDealAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enTotalDealBalance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enCumAvgPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lTotalEntrustAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enTotalEntrustBalance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lEntrustOpAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcOtherInterCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cExceedFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lContractNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dDealCompleteDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{cAmountBalanceFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lAlgoUnentrustAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lFundId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enEarnestBalance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enPrice2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enDailyMax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enInstrTargetRatio,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enCombiTargetRatio,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cBusinClass,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enEstimateFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cRiskInfluenceFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lBeginDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lBeginTime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lEndDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lEndTime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cFundBonusType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lSettleSpeed,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lFirstSettleDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cFirstSettleType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cFaxSendStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lApplyfaxPrintCount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lCancelfaxPrintCount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lSecondSettleDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cSecondSettleType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enAlgoUnentrustBalance,jdbcType=DECIMAL} )
mapper.select: select L_DATE, L_SERIAL_NO, L_DAILY_INSTRUCTION_NO, L_INDEX_DAILY_MODIFY, L_BASECOMBI_ID, C_INVEST_TYPE, VC_INTER_CODE, C_ENTRUST_DIRECTION, EN_PROFIT_RATIO, L_AMOUNT, EN_BALANCE, C_PRICE_TYPE, EN_PRICE1, EN_FACT_PRICE, EN_INTEREST, L_TODAY_ENTRUST_AMOUNT, EN_TODAY_ENTRUST_BALANCE, L_TODAY_DEAL_AMOUNT, EN_TODAY_DEAL_BALANCE, EN_DAY_AVG_PRICE, C_INSTRUCTION_STATUS, C_ENTRUST_EXECUTE_STATUS, C_DEAL_EXECUTE_STATUS, C_CASH_CONTROL_TYPE, C_STOCK_CONTROL_TYPE, C_ORIGINAL_DIRECTION, L_TOTAL_DEAL_AMOUNT, EN_TOTAL_DEAL_BALANCE, EN_CUM_AVG_PRICE, L_TOTAL_ENTRUST_AMOUNT, EN_TOTAL_ENTRUST_BALANCE, L_ENTRUST_OP_AMOUNT, VC_OTHER_INTER_CODE, C_EXCEED_FLAG, EN_FEE, L_CONTRACT_NO, D_DEAL_COMPLETE_DATE, C_AMOUNT_BALANCE_FLAG, L_ALGO_UNENTRUST_AMOUNT, L_FUND_ID, EN_EARNEST_BALANCE, EN_PRICE2, EN_DAILY_MAX, EN_INSTR_TARGET_RATIO, EN_COMBI_TARGET_RATIO, C_BUSIN_CLASS, EN_ESTIMATE_FEE, C_RISK_INFLUENCE_FLAG, L_BEGIN_DATE, L_BEGIN_TIME, L_END_DATE, L_END_TIME, C_FUND_BONUS_TYPE, L_SETTLE_SPEED, L_FIRST_SETTLE_DATE, C_FIRST_SETTLE_TYPE, C_FAX_SEND_STATUS, L_APPLYFAX_PRINT_COUNT, L_CANCELFAX_PRINT_COUNT, L_SECOND_SETTLE_DATE, C_SECOND_SETTLE_TYPE, EN_ALGO_UNENTRUST_BALANCE from T_COMP_CHECKINSSTOCK
mapper.insert:
insert into T_COMP_CHECKINSSTOCK (L_DATE, L_SERIAL_NO, L_DAILY_INSTRUCTION_NO, L_INDEX_DAILY_MODIFY, L_BASECOMBI_ID, C_INVEST_TYPE, VC_INTER_CODE, C_ENTRUST_DIRECTION, EN_PROFIT_RATIO, L_AMOUNT, EN_BALANCE, C_PRICE_TYPE, EN_PRICE1, EN_FACT_PRICE, EN_INTEREST, L_TODAY_ENTRUST_AMOUNT, EN_TODAY_ENTRUST_BALANCE, L_TODAY_DEAL_AMOUNT, EN_TODAY_DEAL_BALANCE, EN_DAY_AVG_PRICE, C_INSTRUCTION_STATUS, C_ENTRUST_EXECUTE_STATUS, C_DEAL_EXECUTE_STATUS, C_CASH_CONTROL_TYPE, C_STOCK_CONTROL_TYPE, C_ORIGINAL_DIRECTION, L_TOTAL_DEAL_AMOUNT, EN_TOTAL_DEAL_BALANCE, EN_CUM_AVG_PRICE, L_TOTAL_ENTRUST_AMOUNT, EN_TOTAL_ENTRUST_BALANCE, L_ENTRUST_OP_AMOUNT, VC_OTHER_INTER_CODE, C_EXCEED_FLAG, EN_FEE, L_CONTRACT_NO, D_DEAL_COMPLETE_DATE, C_AMOUNT_BALANCE_FLAG, L_ALGO_UNENTRUST_AMOUNT, L_FUND_ID, EN_EARNEST_BALANCE, EN_PRICE2, EN_DAILY_MAX, EN_INSTR_TARGET_RATIO, EN_COMBI_TARGET_RATIO, C_BUSIN_CLASS, EN_ESTIMATE_FEE, C_RISK_INFLUENCE_FLAG, L_BEGIN_DATE, L_BEGIN_TIME, L_END_DATE, L_END_TIME, C_FUND_BONUS_TYPE, L_SETTLE_SPEED, L_FIRST_SETTLE_DATE, C_FIRST_SETTLE_TYPE, C_FAX_SEND_STATUS, L_APPLYFAX_PRINT_COUNT, L_CANCELFAX_PRINT_COUNT, L_SECOND_SETTLE_DATE, C_SECOND_SETTLE_TYPE, EN_ALGO_UNENTRUST_BALANCE, L_PURCHASE_DATE )
(select #{item.lDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lSerialNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lDailyInstructionNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lIndexDailyModify,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lBasecombiId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.cInvestType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.vcInterCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.cEntrustDirection,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.enProfitRatio,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.cDealExecuteStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.cCashControlType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.cStockControlType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.cOriginalDirection,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.enTotalEntrustBalance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lEntrustOpAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.vcOtherInterCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.cExceedFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.enFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lContractNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.dDealCompleteDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.cAmountBalanceFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.lAlgoUnentrustAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lFundId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.enEarnestBalance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.enPrice2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.enDailyMax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.enInstrTargetRatio,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.enCombiTargetRatio,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.cBusinClass,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.enEstimateFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.cRiskInfluenceFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.lBeginDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lBeginTime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lEndDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lEndTime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.cFundBonusType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.lSettleSpeed,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lFirstSettleDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.cFirstSettleType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.cFaxSendStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.lApplyfaxPrintCount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lPurchaseDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL} from dual)
